data.name: The Sultan and his Harem
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the Empire!

Plot Summary


After his father’s death, young Sultan inherits the vast Ottoman Empire and begins his reign alongside his clever and loyal wife, Roxelana. Newly married, Suli harbors a secret obsession: an irresistible desire to build the grandest harem in history, collecting extraordinary women from all corners of the world.

As Suleiman navigates the demands of ruling an empire—managing wars, alliances, and court intrigues—his growing harem threatens to disrupt his relationship with Roxelana and the stability of his empire. Choices must be made carefully, as neglecting his duties or disrespecting his wife could lead to rebellion, betrayal, or collapse.

Players will guide Suleiman’s dual pursuits of power and pleasure, balancing empire management, harem building, and personal relationships. Will he become the greatest Sultan in history, or will his ambitions lead to his downfall? The fate of the empire is in your hands.

Unlock countries


Choices matter



Hot girls

data.short_description: The Sultan and His Harem is an adult strategy and relationship game where players step into the role of Suli, ruling the Ottoman Empire while building the most exquisite and diverse harem in history.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2014 or newer Intel Core i5 / AMD
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2016 or newer Intel / AMD chipset
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia or ATi GPU with 2GB+ Memory
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS: Mac OS X 10.8+
  • 處理器: Processor: 2014 or newer Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated chipset
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: OS: Mac OS X 10.8+
  • 處理器: Processor: 2014 or newer Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia or ATi GPU with 1GB+ Memory
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS, or recent 64 bit Linux release
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD 64-bit capable processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated chipset
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS, or recent 64 bit Linux release
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD 64-bit capable processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia or ATi GPU with 1GB+ Memory
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
